entry.title: IDC 692M1519D00007 (P00030) awarded to CDW GOVERNMENT LLC, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: MODIFICATION TO EXTEND THE CONTRACT COMPLETION DATE AND ORDERING PERIOD END DATE BY NINE MONTHS FROM 4/30/2025 TO 1/31/2026.

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: INFORMATION TECHNOLOGY INPUT/OUTPUT AND STORAGE DEVICES

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED
